return(function(M,K,R,j,o,e,D,W,h,k,i,q,V,U,Q,u,I,Z,Y,a,x,w)Z,k,W,h,w,x,q,U,i,u,Q,V,Y,a,I=function(M,P)local K=Q(P)local R=function(R)return k(M,{R},P,K)end return R end,function(k,R,j,o)local
